description: Small Phase 2 scenario pack used by the MVP to quickly test retrieval intent selection, query generation, and grounded guidance behavior.

scenarios.label: Head Injury On Blood Thinners
scenarios.description: High-risk fall where the patient hit their head, uses blood thinners, and cannot stand safely.

answers.consciousness: Yes, but I feel dizzy and slow to respond.
answers.pain_mobility: I have strong pain in my hip and I cannot stand up safely.
answers.head_injury_blood_thinner: I hit my head and I take blood thinners.

scenarios.label: Bystander Sees Abnormal Breathing
scenarios.description: A bystander reports abnormal breathing and poor responsiveness after a fall.

answers.consciousness: The patient is barely responding and seems confused.
answers.pain_mobility: He is breathing strangely and not answering properly.
answers.observation: I am a bystander and I think this is serious.

scenarios.label: Low-Risk Monitoring
scenarios.description: Lower-risk fall where the patient remained conscious and can move with only mild symptoms.

answers.consciousness: Yes, I am awake and speaking clearly.
answers.pain_mobility: I have mild pain but I can move safely.
answers.observation: I slipped, did not hit my head, and stayed conscious.
